calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Off Calendar

Hearing On Defendant Michael Mullen'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY. BYRON C. THOMPSON, TEL. (510)835-2077, APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AMMEL PARK;
ATTY. ROBERT WARD (CLI) WITH SUPERVISING ATTORNEY, ORA S. PROCHOVNICK OF HOUSING ADVOCACY CLINIC, TEL.241-1317, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY MICHAEL MULLEN.

RULING: A R G U E D. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MICHAEL MULLEN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/PM)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS, APR-17-08: BYRON CLAYTON THOMPSON, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; PROPERTY MANAGER ALICIA DORSEY IS ALSO PRESENT AS A PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE. LTD. SCOPE ATTORNEYS ROBERT WARD, ESQ. AND ORA S. PROCHOVNICK, ESQ. APPEAR FOR DEFENDANT MICHAEL MULLEN, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS HELD; THE CASE SETTLES; TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MICHAEL MULLEN IS TO RETAIN POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 649 LAGUNA STREET, #D, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA FROM TODAY'S DATE UNTIL AUGUST 1, 2008, MIDNIGHT, DURING WHICH TIME DEFENDANT IS TO OBEY ALL HOUSE RULES AND REGULATIONS. IF DEFENDANT BREACHES AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY MAY FILE A 72-HOUR NOTICE TO CURE OR A 72-HOUR NOTICE TO TERMINATE. PARTIES AGREE THAT ANY MATTER WILL BE SUBJECT TO A NOTICED MOTION. EACH PARTY TO PAY OWN FEES AND COSTS. ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A 24-HOUR
EX PARTE NOTICE IF TERMS AND AGREEMENTS ARE BREACHED BY DEFENDANT; DEFENDANT MICHAEL MULLEN INFORMS THE COURT ON THE RECORD THAT HE UNDERSTANDS AND AGREES TO ALL TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT THAT IS REACHED THIS DATE; DEFENDANT MICHAEL MULLEN STATES TO THE COURT HE HAS HEARD AND AFFIRMS TO AGREE TO ALL TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT. IT IS THE ORDER OF THE COURT THAT THE MATTER IS SETTLED AND IS OFF CALENDAR FOR TRIAL. TRIAL DATE REMOVED.

PRO TEM JUDGE NILS ROSENQUEST; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; REPORTER LOIS JONES, #3689 (D-218).

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MICHAEL MULLEN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 17, 2008 PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. BYRON CLAYTON THOMPSON, TEL. NO. (510) 835-1600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROBERT WARD OF THE NEW COLLEGE OF THE SCHOOL OF LAW, TEL. NO. 241-1317 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY MICHAEL MULLEN.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT MICHAEL MULLEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS overruled with 5 days leave to answer. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/AL)
